office_does: The treasurer collects and distributes taxes, safeguards and invests county funds, and administers payments and financial records.
race_blurb: Both candidates emphasize stewardship and service; Miller adds modern payment systems, while Viall foregrounds conservative investment and secure distributions.

candidates.summary: Miller has finance, administration, and community-service experience and emphasizes collection accuracy, prudent investment, reporting, and modern payments.
highlights: Emphasizes prudent investment, reporting, and modern payment systems [S1]

spending.basis: Prudent investment and financial reporting support an accountability orientation.

experience.basis: Relevant finance and administration experience is documented, but not elected treasurer tenure.

candidates.summary: Viall is a Chelan-area candidate emphasizing secure funds, timely distributions, conservative investment, service, and transparency.
highlights: Emphasizes conservative investment and secure funds [S1]

spending.basis: Conservative investment and transparency support an oversight-and-restraint orientation.

experience.basis: The dossier documents no specific institutional finance role or elected-office tenure.
